_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Install database management systems and software
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normalization theory, indexing strategies, transaction isolation levels, query execution plans, and performance optimization principles.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Knowledge TF-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-005 (TF, cosine: 0.441), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.418).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.388). Shared vocabulary: [database, management]. NICE-only terms [install, software, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, knowledge, levels] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.918, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Install database management systems and software" and "Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normaliza" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.494 > STS 0.388 (gap +0.106). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [database, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [database, management]. NICE-only: [install, software, systems]. WIDAI-only: [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, knowledge, levels].
